analysis: The project appears to be a web-based educational site about black holes with multiple versions (test-website, github-page, docs). The theme should focus on black holes with animated objects, slides, and pages. The existing To-Dos indicate incomplete CSS, HTML, and JavaScript files that need to be completed with a cosmic/dark theme.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a full cosmic theme including dark backgrounds, glowing text effects, animated black hole visuals, swirling patterns, and glowing elements to create an immersive space experience.
Complete the HTML content to include all sections related to black holes, such as main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and ensure proper structure for the cosmic theme.

Complete the JavaScript content to implement all functions properly, including showSlide, Black Hole Quiz functionality, showRandomQuote, and add event listeners for new buttons with interactive animations.
Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon to improve usability on mobile devices and ensure responsive design for the black hole theme.
